item.description:
Release v4.8.0

Changes since v4.7.0

  • feat: add DownloadPlugin with agent download tools
  • feat(agent): add temp file storage plugin for agent tools
  • feat(mlx): add download pause/resume functionality
  • feat(mlx): add horizontal series tabs for local model settings
  • feat(mlx): enhance download manager with detailed logging and error handling
  • feat(mlx): show download progress in background and restore when view reopens
  • fix: resolve intermittent API Key loss after sleep/lock
  • fix(downloadkit): write downloaded data to destination file
  • refactor(menubar): fix theme adaptation and cleanup menu bar items
